## [06:01 - 09:02]

depending on what your market is and how you feel about things. But frankly, I sleep better at night knowing I've got this, I'm using double opt-in. That's why I've been doing it for so long. and the other thing is that it helps you maintain your sender reputation. Remember they get back to that list hygiene. If you're in that knitting market, I've had a friend that was in those kind of markets, and they're like, my people are, they're not that computer savvy, and they don't even understand this whole idea about, they get confused with the double opt-in, and they never complain about spam, and we're just in a market where I don't have to worry about any of that stuff. People that have tested all the way through, they've tested two different lists, one single, one double, and they said, single, I did better, I made more money.
